title: Pet Food * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Basic Needs > Pet Food * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter AIDS/HIV Foster Families Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Women Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF FIDO PET FOOD BANK VETERANS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides pet food for dogs and cats. 14186 Fir Street Suite 203 Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Veterans, active duty personnel, and families of service members Hours: Wednesday 9am-noon, by appointment only, 3rd Saturday of the month 9am-2pm If food is urgently needed outside of service hours, please call to coordinate sooner pick-up if available. Email (503) 655-3663 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FORT KENNEDY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides food boxes, pet food, clothing, showers, blood pressure checks, bus passes, legal information services, and benefit and housing resources. 7600 SE Johnson Creek Boulevard Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Veterans, all discharge types Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm.
